title: The Gullspång Miracle
overview: Two Norwegian sisters receive a premonition from God that makes them buy an apartment in a tiny Swedish town, Gullspång. Meeting the seller, she is a dead-ringer of their older sister, who committed suicide 30 years ago.

trailers.title: DAS GULLSPÅNG GEHEIMNIS // Trailer // Kinostart 12. September
